text: A user with the USERADMIN role creates a custom role. They then grant this role to SYSADMIN. Who can now drop this custom role?

options.a: Only the user who created it

text: A warehouse is running a single complex query that is spilling to remote storage. Which action will improve the performance of this specific query while it is still running?

options.b: Resizing the Warehouse from Small to Large
options.c: There is no action that will improve the performance of a currently running query

text: When a database is cloned using zero-copy cloning, what happens to the 'Pipes' within that database?

options.a: They are cloned and remain in the same state as the original
options.b: They are cloned but are paused by default
options.c: They are not cloned and must be recreated
options.d: They are cloned but point to a new internal stage created for the clone

text: A permanent table in Enterprise edition has a Time Travel retention of 90 days. If the table is dropped on day 1, what is the last day a user can utilize the UNDROP command?
Which command is used to load data from an external stage into a Snowflake table using the REST API for Snowpipe?
True or False: A Python UDF can be used to read files from an external stage via a scoped URL.
When querying a VARIANT column, how does Snowflake distinguish between a SQL NULL and a JSON null value?

options.b: JSON nulls are stored as strings
options.c: You must use the IS_NULL_VALUE() function to identify a JSON null

text: Which role is the only one capable of creating and managing 'Shares' and 'Data Exchanges'?
A user needs to join data from two different databases to create a Secure View for a Data Share. What privilege must be granted to the Share for this to work?

options.c: SELECT on all tables in both databases

text: True or False: If a warehouse has 'Auto-resume' enabled, it will automatically resume even if the query submitted does not require compute resources (e.g., result cache).
Which function is used to return a 'scoped URL' for a file in a stage, allowing it to be read by a UDF for a limited time?
What is the result of a 'Lateral Flatten' on a VARIANT column containing an empty array?

options.a: It returns a single row with NULL values
options.c: It returns zero rows for that input
options.d: It returns a single row with the array structure intact

text: True or False: Zero-copy cloning is possible for a 'Temporary' table, but the clone itself must also be 'Temporary'.
If a warehouse is configured with Min Clusters = 2 and Max Clusters = 10, how many clusters are started immediately when the warehouse is resumed?
Which role is required to modify a 'Resource Monitor' once it has been created?
True or False: A Snowpark Python DataFrame operation (e.g., filter or join) consumes credits at the time the command is written in the IDE.
explanation: Snowpark uses lazy evaluation; credits are only consumed when an action like .collect() or .saveAsTable() is called.

text: Which metadata-based function can be used in a query to see the file name a specific row was loaded from?
What is the specific duration of the 'Wait' period for the 'Economy' scaling policy before starting a new cluster?
True or False: Fail-safe storage is available for Transient tables if the retention period is set to 1 day.
Which privilege allows a role to see the query text of other users in the Query History page?
When unloading data using COPY INTO, which parameter is used to ensure a single file is produced regardless of the data size?
Which component of the Snowflake architecture handles 'Cloud Services' but is billed as its own separate serverless cost?
True or False: A user with the SYSADMIN role can drop an ACCOUNTADMIN user.
When a warehouse is set to 'Standard' scaling policy, what is the trigger to start an additional cluster?

options.a: When 5 queries are in the queue
options.b: Immediately when a query is queued or the system detects more load than the current cluster can handle

text: What is the maximum size of a single VARIANT column value?
True or False: In a 'Managed Access Schema', the object owner still has the power to grant privileges on their objects to other roles.
explanation: In managed access schemas, only the schema owner (or a role with MANAGE GRANTS) can grant privileges.

text: Which function allows you to determine if a table is currently undergoing 'Auto-Clustering'?
True or False: Zero-copy cloning can be used to clone a table across two different cloud regions.
Which role is recommended for creating a 'Resource Monitor'?
When using a 'Stream' on a 'View', which underlying objects must have Change Tracking enabled?

options.b: The View and all underlying source tables
options.d: Streams cannot be created on Views

text: True or False: A single 'Share' object can contain tables from Database A and Database B simultaneously.
explanation: A share can only contain objects from a single database.

text: What is the result of applying a 'Row Access Policy' to a table that already has 'Dynamic Data Masking'?

options.b: Both policies are applied: Row Access filters the rows, and Masking obscures the columns
options.c: An error is returned; you can only use one
options.d: Masking is applied first, then Row Access

text: Which Snowflake component handles the 'Automatic re-clustering' service?
True or False: 'MFA' in Snowflake must be enabled manually by each user; an administrator cannot force-enable it for a user without their intervention.
What is the impact of the 'PURGE = TRUE' parameter in a COPY command?

options.a: It deletes the data from the Snowflake table after loading
options.b: It deletes the source files from the stage after a successful load
options.c: It clears the metadata cache for that table
options.d: It removes all Time Travel history for that table

text: True or False: A 'Task' can execute a 'PUT' command to upload files to a stage.
Which command allows you to see the exact micro-partition distribution and clustering health of a table?
What is the result of using a 'Materialized View' on top of another 'Materialized View'?

options.b: This is not currently supported in Snowflake
options.c: It creates a nested metadata dependency

text: True or False: A Data Consumer can clone a database created from a 'Share'.
Which view provides the login history for all users in the account for the past 365 days?
When using 'Snowpipe', how is the 'Load History' stored differently than the COPY command?

options.a: Snowpipe load history is kept for 14 days
options.b: Snowpipe load history is kept for 64 days
options.c: Snowpipe load history is deleted immediately after success
options.d: Snowpipe uses the target table's metadata instead of its own

text: True or False: External Functions can return multiple rows for each input row (UDTF equivalent).
Which role is the owner of the 'Snowflake' database and the 'Account Usage' schema?

options.d: No role; it is a system-owned read-only database

text: What is the 'Minimum' size of a Virtual Warehouse required to use the 'Search Optimization Service' effectively?
True or False: A 'Transient' database can contain 'Permanent' tables.
When a Warehouse is suspended and then resumed, what happens to its 'Local Disk Cache'?

options.b: It is partially preserved if resumed within 10 minutes
options.d: It is moved to the Cloud Services layer

text: Which command is used to grant a role to another role (creating a hierarchy)?

options.d: GRANT PRIVILEGE ON role1 TO role2

text: What is the primary benefit of 'External Tables' compared to 'Internal Tables'?

options.b: Data remains in the customer's cloud storage bucket and is not ingested into Snowflake
options.c: 90 days of Time Travel is guaranteed

text: True or False: You can apply a 'Masking Policy' to a column that is used as a 'Clustering Key'.
Which layer of the architecture is responsible for 'Data Compression'?
A user runs a query that takes 1 hour. During that hour, the table data is modified 5 times. Which version of the data does the user's query see?

options.a: The data as it existed the moment the query finished
options.b: The data as it existed the moment the query was submitted
options.c: A mix of versions based on which partition was scanned
options.d: The query will fail with a 'Concurrent Update' error

text: What happens if a warehouse is set to 'Auto-suspend = 0'?

options.a: It suspends immediately after a query

text: True or False: Snowflake allows the use of 'Tri-Secret Secure' even in the Standard edition.
Which view is used to determine which files have been successfully loaded into a table via Snowpipe in the last 14 days?
If you clone a schema that has 'Managed Access' enabled, what is the status of the cloned schema?

options.a: Managed access is disabled in the clone
options.b: Managed access is enabled in the clone
options.c: The clone becomes a standard schema
options.d: Cloning is not possible for managed access schemas

text: True or False: Python UDTFs (Table Functions) require a 'process' method to return rows.
Which role is the only one capable of viewing 'Credit Usage' data in the Snowsight 'Usage' dashboard?
What is the maximum number of days a 'Resource Monitor' can track credit usage before resetting?

options.c: It is based on the reset frequency (Monthly, Yearly, Never)

text: True or False: A Virtual Warehouse can be shared between two different Snowflake Organizations.
Which command is used to add a 'Clustering Key' to a table that was created without one?
True or False: Snowflake handles the automatic partitioning of data 'across' cloud regions for high availability.
Which function is used to cast a VARIANT value to a specific data type like INTEGER?
When a multi-cluster warehouse scales 'down' (removes a cluster), what happens to the queries running on that cluster?

options.b: They are moved to another cluster
options.c: The cluster stays active until all queries on it finish, then it shuts down
options.d: The queries are moved to the cloud services layer

text: True or False: A 'Reader Account' can be converted into a full Snowflake account.
Which layer of the architecture performs 'Query Execution'?
What is the primary way to optimize query performance on an 'External Table'?
True or False: A 'Stream' on a table is automatically dropped if the source table is dropped.
Which command is used to see the list of all 'Functions' (UDFs) in the current schema?
What is the default T-shirt size for a warehouse created via the Web UI if not specified?
True or False: Network Policies can block access based on a user's MAC address.
Which Snowflake edition is required for 'Database Replication' and 'Failover'?
When using FLATTEN, what does the 'SEQ' column represent?

options.a: The order of the elements in the array
options.b: A unique identifier for each input row

text: True or False: You can set a 'Statement Timeout' at the individual User level.
Which view monitors the storage used by 'Fail-safe' for each table?
What happens if a warehouse reaches its 'Suspend Immediately' threshold on a Resource Monitor?

options.b: It suspends immediately and cancels all queries
options.c: It notifies the admin and waits for approval
options.d: It moves queries to a different warehouse

text: True or False: You can apply 'Object Tagging' directly to an individual row in a table.
Which interface is the 'Entry Point' for configuring Federated Authentication (SSO)?
What does 'Pruning' rely on to function properly?
True or False: When you clone a database, the Time Travel data for the tables is also cloned.
explanation: Clones start with a fresh Time Travel history from the moment of cloning.

text: Which role is the 'default' role assigned to every user and role in Snowflake?
True or False: A Python UDF can be used to call a SQL Stored Procedure.
Which Snowflake component manages the 'Result Cache'?
What is the impact of changing a 'Permanent' table to a 'Transient' table?

options.a: It is not possible to change the type of an existing table
options.c: Time Travel is limited to 1 day
options.d: The table is dropped and recreated

text: True or False: Snowflake allows the use of 'Named File Formats' within a Data Share.
Which command is used to see the list of all 'Tasks' in an account?
When using 'Search Optimization Service', which column types are supported? (Choose two.)
True or False: A warehouse consumes credits during the 'Provisioning' state before it is fully active.
Which role is the only one that can see the 'Billing' tab in the classic Snowflake UI?
True or False: MFA is enabled by default for all new Snowflake users.
Which command is used to move data from a Snowflake table to an external stage (Unloading)?
What is the benefit of the 'Snowflake Data Exchange' compared to the 'Snowflake Marketplace'?

options.b: It allows for private, invited sharing within a specific group of accounts

text: True or False: You can apply a 'Masking Policy' to an entire Schema at once.
Which command allows you to view the privileges granted to a specific role?
True or False: The 'Result Cache' is shared across all warehouses in the account.
Which scaling policy favors 'Credit Saving' over 'Performance'?
True or False: A 'Secure UDF' can be shared via a 'Share' object.
What happens if a warehouse is resized 'down' (e.g., Large to Small) during a very high query load?

options.a: New queries are blocked until load drops
options.b: Existing queries finish on the Large servers, but new queries may queue on the Small servers
options.c: The queries are moved to the services layer
options.d: The warehouse resizes back up automatically

text: True or False: You can apply 'Row Access Policies' to External Tables.
Which command is used to remove a file from a stage?
What is the primary function of the 'Snowflake Information Schema'?

options.b: Providing metadata views and system functions for querying account objects
